name: Noé Archiviste
alt_names: ノエ・アルシヴィスト
description:
__Race:__ Vampire
__Height:__ 187 cm (6'1")
__Occupation:__ Student
__Partner:__ 	Vanitas

Noé is a gentleman vampire.

His story began when he received a letter from The Teacher, which explained that The Teacher wanted Noé to fly to Paris immediately, as there had been rumors that The Book of Vanitas had been found there. The Teacher then specifically ordered Noé to discern The Book of Vanitas' true nature.
